title: Another Internal Error: sameHash function undefined (returns 0) for node under CFunc.
body:
---


Author Name: **Jonathon Donaldson**
Original Redmine Issue: 950 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2015-08-03
Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

I get the following error when compiling the attached test case:

```%Error: Internal Error: t_case_group.sv:17: ../V3Hashed.cpp:73: sameHash function undefined (returns 0) for node under CFunc.
```

From what I can tell it's something to do with the numeric literal casting using 7'(). If I just put something like 7'd0 then it works fine.

Example attached in test_regress format.
